title: clausena san-ki var. mollis
intro: Clausena san-ki var. mollis, also known as the Chinese Quinine Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clausena san-ki var. mollis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Clausena san-ki var. mollis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies, such as ointments and salves.
